input: Bug report from ai-agents PR #1989 (paraphrased). 'PR #1965 had a fix loop where the /review wrapper polled get_pr_review_threads.py and merged when unresolved_count returned zero, but the count flickered: bot reviewers (Copilot, Devin) had webhook latency that delayed thread creation. The wrapper saw zero, merged, then more threads arrived. Pre-mortem found that 60s/2-reading default was too aggressive. What is the right polling discipline, and what specific data informs the threshold?'
